name: checks: dry-run annotates pure check as [pure]

app.name: testapp
app.checks_toml:
app = "testapp"
[checks.lint]
tags = ["release"]
severity = "error"
fast = true
pure = true
needs_network = false
depends_on = []

name: checks: dry-run annotates impure check (pure=false) as [impure]

app.name: testapp
app.checks_toml:
app = "testapp"
[checks.deploy]
tags = ["release"]
severity = "error"
fast = false
pure = false
needs_network = false
depends_on = []

name: checks: dry-run annotates network check (needs_network=true) as [impure]

app.name: testapp
app.checks_toml:
app = "testapp"
[checks.fetch]
tags = ["release"]
severity = "error"
fast = true
pure = true
needs_network = true
depends_on = []
